story.iWant: the spec generation pipeline to conditionally include or exclude wireframe and API sections based on user preferences
story.soThat: generated specs are focused and relevant to what the ticket actually needs

tasks.task: Extend CreateTicketDto Add includeWireframes?: boolean (default: true for backward compat) Add includeApiSpec?: boolean (default: true) Add wireframeContext?: string Add wireframeImageAttachmentIds?: string[] Add apiContext?: string Add class-validator decorators: @IsOptional(), @IsBoolean(), @IsString(), @IsArray()

Extend AEC domain entity Add _includeWireframes: boolean and _includeApiSpec: boolean to AEC entity Wire through constructor, createDraft(), and reconstitute() factory methods Default to true in reconstitute() when fields are missing (backward compat)
Update AECMapper Add includeWireframes and includeApiSpec to AECDocument interface Map in toDomain() and toFirestore()

Modify TechSpecGenerator LLM prompts In generateQuestionsWithContext(): skip wireframe/API-related questions when disabled In spec finalization prompt: add conditional exclusion instructions When includeWireframes=true + wireframeContext provided: inject context into design section of prompt When includeApiSpec=true + apiContext provided: inject context into API section of prompt Handle wireframe image attachments: load from storage, include as image context in LLM call

Adjust quality score calculation Modify quality score rubric to skip wireframe/API criteria when those sections are disabled Ensure score reflects completeness of what was requested, not of all possible sections

Pass preferences through CreateTicketUseCase Thread includeWireframes and includeApiSpec from DTO through use case to AEC creation Store wireframeContext and apiContext on AEC for use during finalization

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Given CreateTicketDto receives includeWireframes=false When the spec is finalized Then the LLM prompt explicitly instructs "Do NOT generate UI wireframes, visual QA expectations, or layout guidance" and techSpec.visualQaExpectations is null/empty

Given CreateTicketDto receives includeApiSpec=false When the spec is finalized Then the LLM prompt explicitly instructs "Do NOT generate API endpoint specifications" and techSpec.apiChanges is null/empty
Given wireframeContext is provided in the DTO When the spec is finalized Then the wireframe context text is injected into the LLM prompt as additional design context
Given wireframeImageAttachmentIds are provided When the spec is finalized Then the image attachments are included in the LLM context (as base64 or URL references depending on model capability)
Given apiContext is provided in the DTO When the spec is finalized Then the API context text is injected into the LLM prompt as additional API design context
Given includeWireframes=false and includeApiSpec=false When the quality score is computed Then the score does NOT penalize for missing wireframe or API sections (adjusted rubric)
Given an existing ticket created before this feature When it is loaded Then it defaults to includeWireframes=true and includeApiSpec=true for backward compatibility

artifacts.docs: <doc path="CLAUDE.md" title="Project Development Rules" section="Architecture Rules" snippet="Clean Architecture: presentation -> application -> domain <- infrastructure. Domain must not depend on NestJS, Firebase, HTTP, or external SDKs. Use Cases are the only entry points for business operations." /> <doc path="CLAUDE.md" title="Project Development Rules" section="Design Patterns" snippet="Ports and Adapters for external dependencies. Repository pattern for persistence. Mappers for boundary translation (DTO <-> Domain, Domain <-> Persistence)." />

file.reason: Primary modification target: add includeWireframes, includeApiSpec, wireframeContext, wireframeImageAttachmentIds, apiContext fields with class-validator decorators

Domain entity to extend with _includeWireframes, _includeApiSpec, _wireframeContext, _apiContext, _wireframeImageAttachmentIds fields. Must update constructor, createDraft(), and reconstitute() factory methods.
Factory method for new drafts; must accept and pass through includeWireframes, includeApiSpec, wireframeContext, apiContext parameters
Reconstitution factory; must accept optional includeWireframes/includeApiSpec params defaulting to true for backward compatibility (AC7)
Persistence mapper: add includeWireframes, includeApiSpec, wireframeContext, apiContext, wireframeImageAttachmentIds to AECDocument interface, toDomain(), and toFirestore()
Firestore document interface: add new optional fields with backward-compatible typing
Domain port interface for spec generation. TechSpecInput may need includeWireframes/includeApiSpec fields. generateQuestionsWithContext and generateWithAnswers methods need conditional prompt logic.
TechSpec interface defines apiChanges, visualExpectations, testPlan. These are the sections conditionally included/excluded.
LLM implementation of TechSpecGenerator. Contains prompt templates, generation methods, and calculateQualityScore. Primary target for conditional prompt injection.
Quality score calculation with section-based scoring. Must skip API Changes (0-5) and visual expectations scoring when those sections are disabled (AC6).
Question generation method; must skip wireframe/API-related questions when those sections are disabled (AC1, AC2)
Final spec generation with answers; must inject conditional exclusion instructions and user-provided context into LLM prompts (AC1-5)
Threads DTO fields to AEC.createDraft(). Must pass includeWireframes, includeApiSpec, wireframeContext, apiContext, wireframeImageAttachmentIds from CreateTicketCommand to domain entity.
Command interface: must add includeWireframes, includeApiSpec, wireframeContext, apiContext, wireframeImageAttachmentIds fields
Orchestrates spec finalization. Must read includeWireframes/includeApiSpec from AEC and pass to TechSpecGenerator. Must also pass wireframeContext/apiContext for prompt injection.
Main execution flow: must thread generation preferences from AEC to techSpecGenerator.generateWithAnswers()
Existing design context prompt builder imported by TechSpecGeneratorImpl. May serve as pattern for wireframe context injection.

constraints.constraint: Clean Architecture: DTO changes in presentation layer, AEC changes in domain layer, mapper in infrastructure layer. No boundary crossings.
Domain must not depend on NestJS, Firebase, HTTP, or external SDKs. The AEC entity must remain framework-agnostic.
Use Cases are the only entry points for business operations. Do not bypass CreateTicketUseCase or FinalizeSpecUseCase with direct repository calls.
Mappers for boundary translation (DTO to Domain, Domain to Persistence). AECMapper handles all Firestore serialization.
Strong typing: avoid any. Error handling must be typed.
LLM prompt is the critical piece. Explicitly excluding sections produces better specs than generating everything and filtering.
For wireframe images: if the LLM model supports vision (Claude does), pass images directly. Otherwise describe textually.
Quality score adjustment: when wireframes/API disabled, redistribute weights to remaining sections rather than penalizing for missing sections.
Backward compatibility: existing tickets (pre-migration) must default to includeWireframes=true and includeApiSpec=true.

interface.name: CreateTicketDto
interface.signature: class CreateTicketDto { title: string; description?: string; repositoryFullName?: string; branchName?: string; maxRounds?: number; type?: 'feature'|'bug'|'task'; priority?: 'low'|'medium'|'high'|'urgent'; taskAnalysis?: any; reproductionSteps?: any[]; }

interface.name: CreateTicketCommand
interface.signature: interface CreateTicketCommand { teamId: string; workspaceId?: string; userId: string; userEmail: string; title: string; description?: string; repositoryFullName?: string; branchName?: string; maxRounds?: number; type?: 'feature'|'bug'|'task'; priority?: 'low'|'medium'|'high'|'urgent'; taskAnalysis?: any; reproductionSteps?: any[]; }

interface.name: AEC.createDraft
interface.signature: static createDraft(teamId: string, createdBy: string, title: string, description?: string, repositoryContext?: RepositoryContext, type?: TicketType, priority?: TicketPriority, assignedTo?: string | null): AEC

interface.name: AEC.reconstitute
interface.signature: static reconstitute(id, teamId, createdBy, status, title, description, type, priority, readinessScore, generationState, ...34 more params, folderId?: string | null): AEC

interface.name: AECDocument
interface.signature: interface AECDocument { id: string; teamId: string; ...fields; folderId?: string | null; }

interface.name: TechSpecGenerator.generateQuestionsWithContext
interface.signature: generateQuestionsWithContext(input: { title: string; description?: string; context: CodebaseContext | null; priorAnswers: AnswerContext[]; roundNumber: number; }): Promise<ClarificationQuestion[]>

interface.name: TechSpecGenerator.generateWithAnswers
interface.signature: generateWithAnswers(input: { title: string; description?: string; context: CodebaseContext | null; answers: AnswerContext[]; ticketType?: 'feature'|'bug'|'task'; reproductionSteps?: ReproductionStep[]; }): Promise<TechSpec>

tests.standards: The project uses Jest with ts-jest for unit testing. Test files follow the *.spec.ts naming convention colocated with source files. Use-case tests mock infrastructure adapters (repositories, external services) via jest.fn(). Existing test patterns can be seen in AssignTicketUseCase.spec.ts, ApproveTicketUseCase.spec.ts, ReEnrichWithQAUseCase.spec.ts, and SubmitReviewSessionUseCase.spec.ts. Tests should be deterministic with no external dependencies.

ideas.idea: Test that when AEC has includeWireframes=false, the generated TechSpec has null/empty visualQaExpectations
Test that when AEC has includeApiSpec=false, the generated TechSpec has null/empty apiChanges
Test that wireframeContext string is passed through CreateTicketDto -> CreateTicketCommand -> AEC -> FinalizeSpec pipeline
Test that wireframeImageAttachmentIds are stored on AEC and accessible during finalization
Test that apiContext string is passed through the full pipeline and available during spec generation
Test calculateQualityScore: when includeWireframes=false and includeApiSpec=false, score is not penalized for missing visual/API sections
Test calculateQualityScore: score normalization works correctly with reduced maxScore when sections are disabled
Test AEC.reconstitute() defaults includeWireframes=true and includeApiSpec=true when fields are undefined (backward compat)
Test AECMapper.toDomain() correctly maps missing includeWireframes/includeApiSpec to true defaults
Test AECMapper.toFirestore() includes includeWireframes and includeApiSpec fields
